context.projectOverview: Phase 5 final sprint — offline GEPA `bober evolve`. Closes the self-improvement loop SAFELY: prompt variants are scored ONLY via the Sprint 2 runReplayHarness gate, and the verb NEVER writes agents/<role>.md and is NEVER invoked by runPipeline (writes stay under .bober/evolve/<runId>/). A guard test (sc-4-7) reads gepa.ts/evolve.ts/pipeline.ts as text and asserts both invariants.

completedSprints.title: Replay run gate
completedSprints.summary: 5b804d1 — runReplayHarness(projectRoot, config) → { regressions, improvements, unchanged, total }. THE gate Sprint 4 imports.

relevantFiles: src/orchestrator/selfimprove/replay-harness.ts (runReplayHarness — the sole scoring gate; import it; add a DI seam so the test injects a stub harness)
src/orchestrator/agent-loader.ts (loadAgentDefinition — reads agents/bober-<role>.md; systemPrompt = body after frontmatter)
src/providers/factory.ts (createClient — provider-agnostic; NO @anthropic-ai/sdk or openai import in gepa.ts)
src/orchestrator/lens-panel-parity.test.ts (read-source-as-text precedent for the sc-4-7 guard test)
